name: InnoNav Full Ruleset
description: Comprehensive ruleset - all rules including medium critical. Includes Core ruleset.

rules.justification: There must be exactly one space character on each side of a binary operator.
Function calls should have parenthesis even without parameters.
Variable must have a suffix from: Msg, Tok, Err, Qst, Lbl, Txt.
API page properties should be camel-cased.
API query properties should be camel-cased.
Column controls in API queries should have a camel case name.
Possible overflow assigning text to target with smaller size.
Only find or get record if you need to access the values. Consider using IsEmpty.
FindSet() or Find() must be used only in connection with Next().
Specify either OnAction trigger or RunObject property on an action.
Local variable name is identical to a global variable.
Local variable name is identical to a field, method, or action in the same scope.
Global variable name is identical to a field, method, or action in the same scope.
Use of unassigned variable.
Variable is initialized but not used.
Obsolete tables must specify ObsoleteState and ObsoleteReason.
Record should be modified before saving to the database.
Naming should always be correct.
The Caption property for PageField must be filled in.
Unused methods should be deleted.
FlowFields should be added to the SIFT key.
Non-temporary variables must not be prefixed with Temp.
Limit JIT loads by selecting all fields for load.
Parameter name is identical to a global variable.
Parameter name is identical to a field, method, or action in the same scope.
DrillDownPageId and LookupPageId must be defined. (migrated from LC0004)
Confirm() must use the Confirm Management codeunit. [autofix] (migrated from LC0021)
GlobalLanguage() must use the Translation Helper codeunit. [autofix] (migrated from LC0022)
Use the Page Management codeunit for launching pages. [autofix] (migrated from LC0027)
PermissionSet Caption should not exceed the maximum length. (migrated from LC0014)
Captions must be defined on user-facing objects and controls. (migrated from LC0016)
Events in internal codeunits are not accessible to extensions. [autofix] (migrated from LC0018)
ToolTip must end with a dot. (migrated from LC0026)
ToolTip should start with 'Specifies'. (migrated from LC0036)
Do not use line breaks in ToolTip. (migrated from LC0037)
ToolTip should not exceed 200 characters. (migrated from LC0038)
Enum value zero (0) should be reserved for empty value. (migrated from LC0045)
Empty Enum values should not have a Caption property. (migrated from LC0056)
Enum values must have non-empty Caption to be selectable. (migrated from LC0057)
Event publisher methods should not be public. [autofix]
Use (CR)LFSeparator from Type Helper codeunit. (migrated from LC0085)
Explicitly set AllowInCustomizations for fields omitted on pages. (migrated from LC0035)
Table field must define a ToolTip. (migrated from LC0064)
Duplicate ToolTip between page and table field. (migrated from LC0066)
Sorting field should be part of the keys for table.
Object is marked for removal.
Object is removed. This warning will become an error in a future release.
Implicit conversion from Enum to Option can lead to unexpected runtime issues.
Use of implicit 'with' will be removed. Qualify with 'Rec'.
With should never be used.
Deprecated property. This warning will become an error in a future release.
Promoted property only valid with specific PageType values.
Name conflicts with a built-in member. Choose another name.
Layout file should not be used by multiple layouts.
A Blob cannot be used as a source expression for a page field.
Action should have a value for the Image property.
Page should use UsageCategory and ApplicationArea to be searchable.
Repeater controls in CardPart pages are not supported by the Web client.
Blob with subtype Bitmap is deprecated. Use Media/MediaSet instead.
Group only contains promoted actions not set to PromotedOnly=true.
Name for primary key must be PK.
First 19 field IDs are reserved for primary key fields.
Enum identifier must be within the allowed range.
Msg and Err labels should end with a dot, Qst should end with a question mark.
Internal methods must be invoked with explicit parameters.
Object should not have empty sections.
GridLayout property must not have value Rows.
Unused method parameters.
Duplicate key found.
Enums need to have an init value.
Commit() needs a comment to justify its existence. [autofix] (migrated from LC0002)
Writing to a FlowField requires an explanatory comment. [autofix] (migrated from LC0017)
Procedure must be either local, internal or have XML documentation. (migrated from LC0025)
XML documentation must match procedure signature. [autofix]
Procedure or trigger declaration should not end with semicolon. (migrated from LC0024)
Missing SetLoadFields() before FindSet(). Performance.
Missing ReadIsolation() before FindSet(). Performance.
QFIX objects must have UsageCategory = None.
QFIX objects with OnRun must contain a Confirm call.
Fields must have a ToolTip property.
Event subscriber arguments should use identifier syntax.
Use ReadIsolation property instead of LockTable method. [autofix]
The specified runtime version in app.json is falling behind.
Explicitly set the RunTrigger parameter on built-in methods.
Use SecretText type to protect credentials and sensitive textual values.
Use Error with ErrorInfo or Label variable to improve telemetry.
Internal procedure is declared but never used.
Interface name must start with capital 'I' without spaces.
API page field should use a more descriptive name.
Use Query or Find with Next instead of Count for large record sets.
Use PageStyle datatype instead of string literals.
Option types should be avoided, use Enum if applicable.
Cognitive Complexity threshold exceeded.
AutoIncrement fields cannot be used in temporary tables. (migrated from LC0006)
Zero (0) index access on 1-based List objects. (migrated from LC0070)
AutoCalcFields should only be used for FlowFields or Blob fields. (migrated from LC0042)
EventPublisher IsHandled parameter should be by var. [autofix]
FlowFilter field assignment should use filtering methods.
Incorrect number or type of arguments in Record.Get(). (migrated from LC0075)
Clear(All) does not affect globals in single instance codeunits. (migrated from LC0032)
Page record argument has different type than expected. (migrated from LC0039)
SourceTable property not defined on Page. (migrated from LC0049)
TransferFields field type mismatch. (migrated from LC0044, split 1/2)
TransferFields field name mismatch. (migrated from LC0044, split 2/2)
Incorrect IsHandled parameter assignment. (migrated from LC0071)
ApplicationArea is not applicable to API pages. [autofix] (migrated from LC0060)
API pages must have ODataKeyFields set to SystemId. (migrated from LC0061)
Mandatory field is missing on API page. [autofix] (migrated from LC0062)
Temporary records cannot trigger table triggers.
TableRelation field must have at least the same length as referenced field. (migrated from LC0076)
EnumValue ordinal must be within the allocated application range.
Global procedures in test codeunits must have test attributes.
